'''Tellix''' was an [[Imperial Office of Customs/Legends|Imperial Customs]] Officer stationed on [[Manforgon]]. He once met an individual known as [[Anderun]], and inquired about their last port of call and current cargo. Tellix learned that Anderun was carrying a cargo of [[sand wine]] from [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]].<ref name="RPG-Core" />
